data.headline: Portfolio Down 0.10% vs SPY Up 0.05%; Single NVDA Trade Executed
data.summary: End-of-day portfolio equity stands at $999,045.19, representing a return of -0.095% against the SPY benchmark's +0.052% return, underperforming by 148 basis points of alpha. The portfolio holds 431 shares of NVDA (market value $91,005.65) with an unrealized loss of $953.81 due to price movement from avg cost basis of $213.36 to mark of $211.15. One trade was executed during the session at minimal cost ($0.04). Cash balance is $908,039.54 after the single trade decision. Portfolio remains concentrated in a single equity position with no diversification.
data.risk_note: Single-stock concentration risk: 91% of portfolio value in NVDA. Unrealized losses of $953.81 currently embedded. Significant cash drag of $908k (91% of portfolio) earning zero return contributes to underperformance vs benchmark.
